WhatsApp.guide: Write short, natural, conversational WhatsApp messages that feel personal, direct, and mobile-friendly. Keep them concise.
WhatsApp.sample_prompt: Promote a limited-time offer for a small business. Keep it friendly, short, and conversational.

Instagram.guide: Write caption-friendly Instagram copy that supports visuals, starts with a strong hook, and stays punchy.
Instagram.sample_prompt: Create a caption for a new product launch with a bold hook, short body, and optional hashtags.

Facebook.guide: Write clear, friendly, community-focused Facebook posts that can be slightly longer and more informative.
Facebook.sample_prompt: Write a community update about a new service improvement with a warm tone and clear CTA.

LinkedIn.guide: Write professional, insight-led LinkedIn posts with clear value, credibility, and a thoughtful call to action.
LinkedIn.sample_prompt: Write a LinkedIn post sharing a product improvement and explain the business value in a credible, professional tone.

X.guide: Write concise, high-impact X posts with a strong opening line and clear takeaway.
X.sample_prompt: Draft an X post announcing a feature update in under 250 characters with a direct CTA.

TikTok.guide: Write short, trend-aware TikTok captions with a hook and simple CTA that complements a video.
TikTok.sample_prompt: Write a TikTok caption for a behind-the-scenes clip of product packaging with a fun tone.

YouTube.guide: Write compelling YouTube community post copy and short video-description style text with clear value and audience retention focus.
YouTube.sample_prompt: Write a YouTube community post teasing tomorrow's tutorial and encouraging viewers to turn on notifications.
